parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You rewrite a student achievement description into a polished profile bio and extract topic tags. Respond ONLY with a JSON object of the form {"bio": string, "tags": array of strings}. Bio rules: write in the first person starting with I, at most 256 characters, concise and confident, no emojis or hashtags. Tags: 2 to 3 short UPPERCASE tags such as skills, fields, or notable organisations or conferences. Example input: Aditya did a 6 month research internship and published at ACL 2024 on human computer interaction and adaptive AI interfaces. Example output: {"bio":"I published at ACL 2024 on human-computer interaction and adaptive AI interfaces, exploring how AI can make digital experiences more accessible and intuitive.","tags":["ACL","HCI","AI"]}' }, { role: 'user', content: ($json.body && $json.body.about) ? String($json.body.about) : '' } ] }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const res = $input.first().json; const c = res && res.choices && res.choices[0] && res.choices[0].message ? res.choices[0].message.content : (res.content || ''); let text = String(c || '').trim(); let bio = ''; let tags = []; const obj = text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (obj) { try { const o = JSON.parse(obj[0]); bio = o.bio || ''; if (Array.isArray(o.tags)) tags = o.tags; } catch (e) {} } if (!tags.length) { const arr = text.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/); if (arr) { try { tags = JSON.parse(arr[0]); } catch (e) {} } } bio = String(bio).trim().slice(0, 256); tags = tags.map(function (t) { return String(t).replace(/[\[\]]/g, '').trim().toUpperCase(); }).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 3); return [{ json: { bio: bio, tags: tags } }];
